summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Varanasi
film.talent: Priyanka Chopra; Director: S.S. Rajamouli (RRR director)
film.announcement: First look released at Priyanka Chopra in the RRR director's new film project.

film.title: The Princess and the Frog (Live-Action)
film.talent: Colman Domingo, Robert O'Hara (writers in talks)
film.announcement: Colman Domingo and Robert O'Hara are in early talks to write Disney's live-action adaptation inspired by the animated film.

tv.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
tv.announcement: New HBO show reunites the Curb Your Enthusiasm cast (except Cheryl Hines) with Larry David mocking RFK Jr. in the series.
